evidence.title: Ledger MCP server
evidence.summary: The selected source registers three bounded, read-only MCP tools for the Contribution Pack workflow.

evidence.title: MCP client integration test
evidence.summary: A real MCP client lists and calls the bundled tools through the plugin's committed stdio configuration.

evidence.title: Human confirmation boundary
evidence.summary: The public trust model keeps PM Agent assessment advisory and requires a different authenticated teammate for final confirmation.

claims.description: Implemented and integration-tested the bundled Ledger MCP tool surface.
Defined the product boundary between advisory agent assessment and authoritative human confirmation.
claims.uncertainty: The relative attribution between product direction and implementation should be confirmed by a teammate.
